# Privacy Policy

This privacy policy applies to the Cookle app for iPhone and iPad.

## Data You Store in Cookle

Cookle lets you create and manage recipes, cooking diary entries, tags, photos,
settings, and related cooking data. This data is stored on your device. If you
enable iCloud sync, supported app data may also be stored in your Apple iCloud
account through Apple's CloudKit services.

The developer does not operate a separate server that receives your recipes,
diary entries, photos, or cooking data.

## Location Data

Cookle does not request or collect precise location data.

## Advertising and Third-Party Services

Cookle uses Google AdMob to show advertisements. AdMob may collect device,
advertising, usage, diagnostic, or similar data according to Google's own
policies and the choices available on your device.

Cookle also uses Apple services such as iCloud, StoreKit, App Store purchases,
push notification infrastructure, and system frameworks. Those services are
provided by Apple and are governed by Apple's terms and privacy policies.

Third-party privacy information:

- [Google AdMob privacy information](https://support.google.com/admob/answer/6128543)
- [Apple Privacy Policy](https://www.apple.com/legal/privacy/)

## Network Access

Cookle may use network access for advertisements, StoreKit purchases,
subscription status, iCloud sync, and remote configuration checks such as
whether the current app version must be updated.

## Data Deletion

You can delete Cookle's locally stored app data from inside the app where data
deletion controls are provided. You can also remove the app from your device to
delete local app data according to iOS behavior.

If iCloud sync is enabled, deleting synced data may also affect data stored in
your iCloud account. You can manage iCloud app data through Apple's iCloud
settings.

## Children

Cookle is not directed to children under 13. The developer does not knowingly
collect personal information from children under 13.

## Changes

This policy may be updated from time to time. Updates are published on this
page.

Effective date: 2026-06-12

## Contact

If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact the developer at
<https://twitter.com/muhiro_12>.
